command:
echo "=== SYSTEMD STATUS ==="
systemctl status gitea --no-pager -l

echo "=== WHICH APP.INI IS LOADED ==="
cat /home/jose/gitea/data/gitea/conf/app.ini 2>/dev/null | head -60 || echo "NOT FOUND"

echo "=== FALLBACK APP.INI ==="
cat /usr/local/bin/custom/conf/app.ini 2>/dev/null | head -60 || echo "NOT FOUND"

echo "=== DATABASE FILES - SIZE CHECK ==="
ls -lah /home/jose/gitea/data/gitea/gitea.db 2>/dev/null || echo "NO DB at jose path"
ls -lah /var/lib/gitea/data/gitea.db 2>/dev/null || echo "NO DB at var/lib path"

echo "=== REPO DIRECTORIES ==="
ls -lah /home/jose/gitea/data/git/repositories/ 2>/dev/null || echo "NO REPOS at jose path"
ls -lah /var/lib/gitea/data/gitea/repositories/ 2>/dev/null || echo "NO REPOS at var/lib path"
ls -lah /var/lib/gitea/repositories/ 2>/dev/null || echo "NO REPOS at var/lib/repos"

echo "=== OWNERSHIP CHECK ==="
namei -l /home/jose/gitea/data/gitea/conf/app.ini 2>/dev/null

echo "=== GIT USER INFO ==="
id git

echo "=== /var/lib/gitea EXISTS? ==="
ls -lah /var/lib/gitea 2>/dev/null || echo "NOT FOUND"

echo "=== /etc/gitea EXISTS? ==="
ls -lah /etc/gitea 2>/dev/null || echo "NOT FOUND"
